label: Send SMS
description: Send a single SMS message to a phone number.

parameters.name: to
parameters.label: Recipient Phone Number
parameters.help: Phone number in international format, e.g. 48500600700

parameters.name: message
parameters.label: Message
parameters.help: SMS message content. Standard SMS is 160 characters (70 for Unicode).

parameters.name: from
parameters.label: Sender Name
parameters.help: Registered sender name (max 11 characters). Leave empty to use account default.

parameters.name: date
parameters.label: Schedule Date
parameters.help: Schedule sending for a future date/time (ISO 8601 format). Leave empty for immediate sending.

parameters.name: flash
parameters.label: Flash SMS
parameters.help: Send as a flash SMS (displayed immediately on screen without being saved).

parameters.name: normalize
parameters.label: Normalize Number
parameters.help: Automatically normalize the phone number format.

parameters.name: idx
parameters.label: External ID
parameters.help: Your custom external identifier for this message.

parameters.message: Przypominamy o wizycie jutro o godz. 10:00.
